description:
Seedance 2.0 Fast supports the text and image inputs but is optimized for speed, making it ideal for rapid iteration, quick concept testing, and high‑volume creative workflows.

Cost estimate - $0.115 per second (10300 tokens per second) at 480p, $0.24752 per second (22100 tokens per second) at 720p, at a rate of $0.0112  per 1000 tokens.
